info.name: Application Submission Flow
info.description: Exercises the full intake submission flow: verification checklist creation, service call results, expedited flagging, eligibility write-back, and person matching. Requires the mock server running at http://localhost:1080.

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Applicant creates a new draft application.

item.name: Add member A (SNAP + Medicaid — match: confirmed)

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Applicant adds a household member applying for both SNAP and Medicaid.

item.name: Add member B (SNAP only — match: no_match)

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Applicant adds a household member applying for SNAP only.

exec: pm.test('member B created', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(201); pm.collectionVariables.set('memberBId', pm.response.json().id); });

item.name: Add member C (Medicaid only — match: review_required)

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Applicant adds a household member applying for Medicaid only.

exec: pm.test('member C created', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(201); pm.collectionVariables.set('memberCId', pm.response.json().id); });

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Applicant records an income source for member A.

exec: pm.test('income A created', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(201); pm.collectionVariables.set('incomeAId', pm.response.json().id); });

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Applicant records an income source for member B.

---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Applicant records an income source for member C.

---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Formally files the application and starts the regulatory processing clock.

---
event:
  type: intake.application.submitted
---
Verifies the event was published when the application was submitted.

exec: // x-diagram: opt Identity — SNAP + Medicaid (per member)

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.application.submitted
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications
  body:
    sourceType: member
    category: identity
    verificationType: electronic
---
Intake creates one identity verification per SNAP member (A and B). Member C is Medicaid-only and gets citizenship and immigration verifications instead.

exec: pm.test('identity verification created for member A (SNAP)', () => pm.expect(identityA).to.exist);
pm.test('identity verification created for member B (SNAP)', () => pm.expect(identityB).to.exist);

item.name: Stub: fdsh_ssa → call.completed (conclusive) for identity A

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.verification.created
action:
  method: POST
  path: /data-exchange/service-calls
  body:
    serviceType: fdsh_ssa
---
Intake initiates an FDSH SSA identity check when the identity verification is created.

exec: const event = events.find(e => e.data?.serviceType === 'fdsh_ssa' && e.data?.metadata?.intake?.verificationId === identityVerifIdA);

request.description:
---
event:
  type: data_exchange.call.completed
---
Data Exchange publishes call.completed when the external service returns a conclusive result.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: data_exchange.call.completed
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications/{id}/satisfy
---
Intake satisfies the verification when the service call returns a conclusive result.

exec: pm.test('AC 3 — identity verification satisfied event published', () => {

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.application.submitted
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications
  body:
    sourceType: member
    category: citizenship
    verificationType: electronic
---
Intake creates one citizenship verification per Medicaid member (A and C) in response to application submission (42 CFR § 435.956(b)).

exec: pm.test('citizenship verification created for member A (Medicaid)', () => pm.expect(citizenA).to.exist);
pm.test('citizenship verification created for member C (Medicaid)', () => pm.expect(citizenC).to.exist);

item.name: Stub: fdsh_ssa → call.completed (conclusive) for citizenship A

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.verification.created
action:
  method: POST
  path: /data-exchange/service-calls
  body:
    serviceType: fdsh_ssa
---
Intake initiates an FDSH SSA citizenship check when the citizenship verification is created.

exec: const event = events.find(e => e.data?.serviceType === 'fdsh_ssa' && e.data?.metadata?.intake?.verificationId === citizenshipVerifIdA);
pm.test('service call created for citizenship (fdsh_ssa)', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); pm.expect(event).to.exist; });

request.description:
---
event:
  type: data_exchange.call.completed
---
Data Exchange publishes call.completed when FDSH SSA returns a conclusive citizenship result.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: data_exchange.call.completed
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications/{id}/satisfy
---
Intake satisfies the citizenship verification when the FDSH SSA call returns conclusive.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.application.submitted
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications
  body:
    sourceType: member
    category: immigration
    verificationType: electronic
---
Intake creates one immigration verification per Medicaid member (A and C) in response to application submission (42 CFR § 435.956(c)).

exec: pm.test('immigration verification created for member A (Medicaid)', () => pm.expect(immigA).to.exist);
pm.test('immigration verification created for member C (Medicaid)', () => pm.expect(immigC).to.exist);

item.name: Stub: fdsh_vlp → call.completed (conclusive) for immigration A

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.verification.created
action:
  method: POST
  path: /data-exchange/service-calls
  body:
    serviceType: fdsh_vlp
---
Intake initiates an FDSH VLP immigration status check when the immigration verification is created.

exec: const event = events.find(e => e.data?.serviceType === 'fdsh_vlp' && e.data?.metadata?.intake?.verificationId === immigrationVerifIdA);
pm.test('service call created for immigration (fdsh_vlp)', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(200); pm.expect(event).to.exist; });

request.description:
---
event:
  type: data_exchange.call.completed
---
Data Exchange publishes call.completed when FDSH VLP returns a conclusive immigration status result.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: data_exchange.call.completed
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications/{id}/satisfy
---
Intake satisfies the immigration verification when the FDSH VLP call returns conclusive.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.application.submitted
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications
  body:
    category: income
    verificationType: electronic
---
Intake creates one income verification per income source per SNAP member in response to application submission.

exec: pm.test('income verifications created (at least 2 for SNAP members A and B)', () => {
pm.test('income verification found for member A income', () => pm.expect(incomeA).to.exist);

item.name: Stub: ssa_ievs → call.completed (inconclusive) for income A

request.description:
---
trigger:

action:

---
Intake initiates an SSA IEVS income check when the income verification is created.

exec: const event = events.find(e => e.data?.serviceType === 'ssa_ievs' && e.data?.metadata?.intake?.verificationId === incomeVerifIdA);

Intake marks the verification inconclusive when the service call returns an inconclusive result.

exec: pm.test('AC 4 — income verification inconclusive event published', () => {

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: data_exchange.call.completed
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications
  body:
    verificationType: document
---
Intake creates a document-type fallback verification when a service call returns inconclusive (per 42 CFR § 435.940).

exec: pm.test('AC 4 — document fallback verification created event published', () => {

item.name: Send income fallback document request notice

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: communication
---
Communication sends a document request notice when the income document fallback verification is created.

exec: if (!ok) return; // gap — Communication not yet implemented

request.description:
---
event:
  type: communication.notice.sent
---
Verifies the notice was sent for the income fallback document request.

exec: pm.test('communication.notice.sent — gap (Communication not yet implemented)', () => true);

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: communication.notice.sent
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /intake/applications/verifications/{id}
---
Intake appends the notice to the verification documentRequests when Communication confirms the notice was sent.

exec: pm.test('AC 4 — income fallback documentRequests — gap (Communication not yet implemented)', () => true);
pm.test('AC 4 — income fallback documentRequests has one entry', () => {

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.application.submitted
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications
  body:
    category: residency
    verificationType: document
---
Intake creates a household-level residency verification (document type) for SNAP at submission. No electronic check exists for residency (7 CFR § 273.2(f)(1)(iii)). Medicaid does not require a residency verification through intake.

---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: communication
---
Communication sends a document request notice when the residency verification is created.

exec: if (!ok) return; // gap — Communication not yet implemented

request.description:
---
event:
  type: communication.notice.sent
---
Verifies the notice was sent for the residency document request.

exec: pm.test('communication.notice.sent — gap (Communication not yet implemented)', () => true);

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: communication.notice.sent
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /intake/applications/verifications/{id}
---
Intake appends the notice to the verification documentRequests when Communication confirms the notice was sent.

exec: pm.test('AC 2 — residency documentRequests — gap (Communication not yet implemented)', () => true);
pm.test('AC 2 — residency documentRequests has one entry', () => {

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: user
  actor: applicant
---
Applicant initiates a document upload session to satisfy a residency verification.

item.name: Document uploaded and linked to application

exec: if (!ok) return; // gap — Document Management not yet implemented

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: document_management
---
Document Management creates the document record after processing the upload.

exec: pm.test('document_management.document_version.uploaded — gap (Document Management not yet implemented)', () => true);

request.description:
---
event:
  type: document_management.document_version.uploaded
---
Verifies the event was published when the document was uploaded.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: document_management.document_version.uploaded
action:
  method: POST
  path: /intake/applications/verifications/{id}/satisfy
---
Intake satisfies the residency verification when the uploaded document is linked to the verification.

exec: pm.test('residency verification satisfied — gap (Document Management not yet implemented)', () => true);

request.description:
---
event:
  type: intake.application.submitted
---
Verifies the event was published when the application was submitted.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.application.submitted
action:
  method: POST
  path: /workflow/tasks
---
Workflow creates a review task when an application is submitted.

item.name: Task routed to queue and priority initialized

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: workflow.task.created
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /workflow/tasks/{id}
---
Workflow assigns the task to the intake review queue and sets its initial priority.

---
event:
  type: intake.application.submitted
---
Verifies the event was published when the application was submitted.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: intake.application.submitted
action:
  method: POST
  path: /eligibility/determinations
---
Eligibility creates a Determination record when an application is submitted, initiating pre-screening.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: eligibility.determination.created
action:
  method: POST
  path: /eligibility/determinations/decisions
  body:
    program: snap
---
Eligibility creates one Decision per member per program when a Determination is created.

exec: pm.test('eligibility.decision.created emitted for SNAP (members A and B)', () => {
pm.test('SNAP decision for member A', () => pm.expect(snapDecisions.find(e => e.data?.memberId === memberAId)).to.exist);
pm.test('SNAP decision for member B', () => pm.expect(snapDecisions.find(e => e.data?.memberId === memberBId)).to.exist);

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: eligibility.determination.created
action:
  method: POST
  path: /eligibility/determinations/decisions
  body:
    program: medicaid
---
Eligibility creates one Decision per member per program when a Determination is created.

exec: pm.test('eligibility.decision.created emitted for Medicaid (members A and C)', () => {
pm.test('Medicaid decision for member A', () => pm.expect(medicaidDecisions.find(e => e.data?.memberId === memberAId)).to.exist);
pm.test('Medicaid decision for member C', () => pm.expect(medicaidDecisions.find(e => e.data?.memberId === memberCId)).to.exist);

request.description:
---
event:
  type: eligibility.application.expedited
---
Verifies the event was published when eligibility screening confirmed expedited criteria are met.

---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: eligibility
---
Eligibility publishes the expedited event when screening confirms the applicant meets expedited SNAP criteria.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: eligibility.application.expedited
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /intake/applications/{id}
  body:
    isExpedited: true
---
Intake sets isExpedited on the application when eligibility confirms expedited criteria are met.

---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: eligibility
---
Eligibility publishes the decision_completed event when the SNAP determination is finalized.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: eligibility.application.decision_completed
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /intake/application-members/{id}
---
Intake writes the SNAP eligibility outcome back to the ApplicationMember when the decision is completed.

exec: pm.test('AC 6 — snap determination written to member A', () => {
// x-diagram: opt Medicaid RTE qualified (per Medicaid member)

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: eligibility.determination.created
action:
  method: POST
  path: /data-exchange/service-calls
  body:
    serviceType: fdsh_fti
---
Eligibility initiates an IRS Federal Tax Information check as part of MAGI income determination.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: eligibility.determination.created
action:
  method: POST
  path: /data-exchange/service-calls
  body:
    serviceType: fdsh_medicare_vci
---
Eligibility initiates a Medicare VCI check as part of MAGI Medicaid eligibility determination.

---
event:
  type: data_exchange.call.completed
---
Data Exchange publishes call.completed when IRS returns the Federal Tax Information result.

---
event:
  type: data_exchange.call.completed
---
Data Exchange publishes call.completed when the Medicare VCI check returns a result.

---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: eligibility
---
Eligibility publishes the decision_completed event when the MAGI Medicaid determination is finalized.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: eligibility.application.decision_completed
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /intake/application-members/{id}
---
Intake writes the Medicaid eligibility outcome back to the ApplicationMember when the decision is completed.

exec: pm.test('AC 6 — medicaid determination written to member A', () => {

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: client_management
---
Client Management publishes a confirmed person match for member A with high confidence.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: client_management.person.match_resolved
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /intake/application-members/{id}
---
Intake sets personId and personMatch on the ApplicationMember when the match is confirmed.

---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: client_management
---
Client Management publishes a no_match result for member B — no existing person record found.

item.name: Member B no_match — personId not set

request.description:
---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: client_management.person.match_resolved
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /intake/application-members/{id}
---
Intake records the no_match status on the ApplicationMember. personId is not set for no_match results.

---
trigger:
  type: external
  domain: client_management
---
Client Management publishes a review_required result for member C — multiple candidates found with similar confidence scores.

---
trigger:
  type: event
  event: client_management.person.match_resolved
action:
  method: PATCH
  path: /intake/application-members/{id}
---
Intake records the review_required status and candidate list on the ApplicationMember for caseworker review.
